characters.name: Marcus Vance
characters.mask: A low-level, unassuming L3 junior developer content with simple tasks.
characters.trueNature: A brilliant, perfectionist L9 Chief Architect who cannot resist fixing broken systems.

characters.name: Richard Sterling
characters.mask: A decisive, authoritative CEO in control of his company.
characters.trueNature: An incompetent leader who relies on bluster and intimidation to hide his lack of technical understanding.

characters.name: Evelyn Vance
characters.mask: A cold, ruthless, and detached venture capitalist.
characters.trueNature: A pragmatic opportunist who values results and talent above corporate hierarchy.

pressureChoices.pressure: The company's database is failing, and the CTO is about to perform a destructive hard-reset.
pressureChoices.choiceA: Stay hidden as an L3 and let the company fail, preserving his peaceful anonymity.
pressureChoices.choiceB: Intervene, reveal his true expertise, and lose his quiet life.

pressureChoices.pressure: Evelyn offers him the Chief Architect position after he saves the system.
pressureChoices.choiceA: Refuse and return to his quiet life as an L3.
pressureChoices.choiceB: Accept the role to save the junior engineers from bad management.

dimensions.positive: takes responsibility for the well-being of his team
dimensions.negative: attempts to hide from his own talent and obligations
lacks the technical knowledge to manage his own company

emotionalMoments.trigger: realizing he must step in to fix the architecture despite his desire to remain anonymous.
being exposed as incompetent in front of his board and employees by Marcus.

desires.consciousDesire: A simple, stress-free life as a junior developer.
desires.subconsciousDesire: The intellectual satisfaction of solving complex problems and mentoring others.

desires.consciousDesire: Maintain control and authority over his company.
Fix the company's backend and monetize the infrastructure.
desires.subconsciousDesire: Control over the most talented assets in the industry.
